stack: WordPress 7.0 + Elementor 4.1.1 Pro + Rank Math SEO

failed_audits.title: Serve images in next-gen formats (6 PNG images on homepage)
failed_audits.display: Frame-26.png through Frame-32.png served as PNG. Convert to WebP for 30-50% size reduction.

failed_audits.title: Eliminate render-blocking resources (20+ CSS files in <head>)
failed_audits.display: Elementor loads 20+ separate CSS files synchronously. Enable Improved Asset Loading and Critical CSS experiments.

failed_audits.title: Properly size images — hero images not preloaded
failed_audits.display: No fetchpriority='high' or preload hint for LCP hero image. Add <link rel='preload' as='image'> in <head>.

failed_audits.title: Avoid chaining critical requests — no font preconnect hints
failed_audits.display: Google Fonts load without preconnect to fonts.googleapis.com or fonts.gstatic.com. Add preconnect hints.

failed_audits.title: Reduce unused JavaScript — jQuery + Elementor bundle
failed_audits.display: jQuery 3.7.1 + Elementor Pro + ElementsKit loaded on every page. Enable Delay JavaScript Execution in Elementor.

opportunities.title: Preconnect to required origins (Google Fonts)
opportunities.display: Add <link rel='preconnect'> for fonts.googleapis.com and fonts.gstatic.com. Estimated 300-600ms LCP improvement.

opportunities.title: Convert PNG images to WebP (6 homepage images)
opportunities.display: Convert Frame-26.png through Frame-32.png to WebP format. 30-50% file size reduction.

opportunities.title: Enable page caching (no caching detected)
opportunities.display: WordPress with Elementor renders PHP on every request. WP Rocket or LiteSpeed Cache reduces TTFB by 80%.

opportunities.title: Defer non-critical JavaScript (Elementor + ElementsKit)
opportunities.display: Enable Elementor Delay JavaScript Execution experiment. Reduces TBT and INP significantly.

opportunities.title: Preload Largest Contentful Paint image
opportunities.display: Add fetchpriority='high' and <link rel='preload'> for the hero/LCP image.

seo_audits.title: Article schema used on agency homepage (should be ProfessionalService)
seo_audits.display: Rank Math injecting Article schema on homepage. Replace with ProfessionalService + Organization.

seo_audits.title: /elementor-pro/ plugin artifact page in XML sitemap
seo_audits.display: Auto-generated Elementor Pro template page appears in sitemap. Noindex and remove from sitemap immediately.

seo_audits.title: No blog post sitemap despite /blog/ being indexed
seo_audits.display: sitemap_index.xml has only page-sitemap.xml. Enable Posts sitemap in Rank Math.

seo_audits.title: WordPress version 7.0 exposed in HTML generator meta tag
xmlrpc.php advertised in HTML head (security risk)
seo_audits.display: Remove EditURI link and disable XML-RPC via add_filter('xmlrpc_enabled', '__return_false').

crux.note: Heuristic estimates — no CrUX API key configured. Validate at cruxvis.withgoogle.com

gsc.note: No Google Search Console credentials configured. Set up via /seo google setup.

inspection.note: No Google Search Console credentials configured for URL Inspection API.

critical_issues: /elementor-pro/ plugin artifact page in public XML sitemap — noindex and remove
No blog post sitemap despite /blog/ existing — enable Posts sitemap in Rank Math
Article schema on homepage — replace with ProfessionalService schema
Homepage OG type is 'article' with article:published_time — set to 'website'
No Google Business Profile signals detected — invisible in Ghana map pack
quick_wins: Add <link rel='preconnect'> for Google Fonts origins (5 min, saves 300-600ms LCP)
Change Google Fonts display=auto to display=swap (5 min, eliminates FOIT)
Enable Elementor Delay JS + Critical CSS + Improved Asset Loading (10 min)
Noindex /elementor-pro/ and remove from sitemap in Rank Math (10 min)
Create /llms.txt with business description for AI search visibility (30 min)

local_seo.city_targeting: Ghana (country-level only, no Accra city targeting)
